item.title: Caulfield Cup gets prize money boost in time for 150th running
item.description: The changes put the race in line with the Melbourne Cup, and will help European horses qualify.

item.title: Sarah Tuck’s Japanese beef udon is the cosy dinner everyone will want this winter
item.description: Warm up with this comforting bowl of beef, noodles and flavour-packed broth.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle respond to UK’s social media ban for under 16s
item.description: ‘The burden cannot rest solely on parents and children.’

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife contestant Miranda reveals what happened after confrontation with farmer Zac’s sister
item.description: The 21-year-old has said viewers didn’t see what happened immediately afterwards.

item.title: Struggling Pizza Hut chain to be sold by parent company Yum Brands for $A3.8 billion
item.description: The parent company says the pizza chain has struggled with outdated stores and growing competition.

item.title: Jockey Billy Loughnane and Bow Echo tough it out in ‘messy’ St James’s Palace race at Royal Ascot
item.description: ‘The horse definitely got me out of trouble.’

item.title: Russian warship opens fire at British yacht in the English Channel
item.description: Shots were fired at a civilian vessel near Isle of Wight as tensions between London and Moscow intensify.

item.title: Coolmore considers Mission Central for Everest after win in Group 1 King Charles III Stakes
item.description: Trainer Aidan O’Brien and jockey Ryan Moore now have a complete set of Royal Ascot Group 1 wins and Coolmore has The Everest on its mind.

item.title: Armed group take woman and child from Ebola clinic in DRC as deadly outbreak spreads
item.description: Community distrust in health workers is hampering efforts to contain the spread.

item.title: Serena Williams to make grand slam return at Wimbledon alongside sister Venus
item.description: The All England Club have confirmed a wildcard for the 44-year-old.

item.title: Billions to keep flowing in childcare fee battle locking in 15 per cent pay rise for workers
item.description: It's hoped higher wages and a renewed pledge from centres on fees will prove a boost for the sector and a boon for parents.

item.title: MasterChef star Steph De Sousa honours late sister with favourite recipe for MND Awareness Month
item.description: This apple sour cream slice is easy, affordable and packed with flavour.

item.title: Hundreds of Western Australian residents cop 25 per cent Supagas LPG gas bill increase amid Middle East market impacts
item.description: For many of the affected households in WA, there are no alternative providers to turn to.

item.title: Norway's crown princess Mette-Marit has successful lung transplant
item.description: It comes after the 52-year-old was told she likely had only a year to live.

item.title: Trump says Iran deal avoided global ‘economic catastrophe’
item.description: ‘I didn’t want to see economic catastrophe. If you kept this going, that could have happened.’

item.title: Workings of Pauline Hanson banner stunt revealed as investigation launched into National Press Club protest
item.description: An activist group has claimed responsibility for the stunt.

item.title: Channel 7 sports reporter Xander McGuire wins over internet with fresh AFL takedown
item.description: The Channel 7 sports reporter has moved into rare air, and fans are saying he’s already ‘better than Eddie’.

item.title: Jackie O vows to continue multimillion-dollar legal battle with ARN
item.description: It comes just days after co-host Kyle Sandilands settled for $12.09m.

item.title: DFAT downgrades Middle East travel advice as US President Donald Trump signs Iran Memorandum of Understanding in France
item.description: Foreign Minister Penny Wong issued a warning as she welcomed the deal.

item.title: Six-time NBL champion Jesse Wagstaff gunning for Commonwealth Games gold at 40
item.description: ‘Every time you get the chance to pull on the green and gold it means something special.’

item.title: ‘Cruel’ abortion bill torpedoed after dramatic night in South Australia’s parliament
item.description: It was the third unsuccessful attempt in recent years to tighten the law in the state.

item.title: HSBC to pay $35 million penalty over failure to protect customers from scams
item.description: The corporate regulator said the outcome is ‘one of the first of its kind globally’.

item.title: Qantas to launch non-stop flights between Sydney and London within 18 months
item.description: The game-changing aircraft will fly Aussies to the UK in 20-plus hour flights.

item.title: Aussie jockey Zac Lloyd enjoys maiden Royal Ascot triumph with Moonfall
item.description: The 22-year-old was all smiles after a landmark Royal Ascot winner on his ‘only bullet for the week’.

item.title: Norway’s Crown Princess Mette-Marit undergoes lung transplant days after son sentenced for rape
item.description: The future queen of Norway has been battling chronic lung disease since 2018 and was put on a transplant list 12 days ago.

item.title: First tankers cross Strait of Hormuz sparking tentative relief as US Vice President JD Vance slams Israel for getting in the way of peace
item.description: Trump’s memorandum for peace also called for the ‘permanent termination’ of the war in Lebanon but Vice President JD Vance has since taken aim at behaviour in the Middle East he said was ‘not acceptable’.

item.title: Outgoing Wallabies coach Joe Schmidt explains shock decision to overlook Lukhan Salakaia-Loto
item.description: Incoming coach Les Kiss was consulted heavily before the final call was made to leave out one of his own Queensland stars.

item.title: Brooklyn Beckham takes swing at Victoria and David as entire World Cup video released by Door Dash
item.description: The teaser was juicy but the release of Brooklyn Beckham’s entire sponsored video has taken the family feud to a whole new level.

item.title: Man accused of throwing boy, 3, into crocodile enclosure at UK zoo released on bail
item.description: The three-year-old boy remains in hospital in a critical but stable condition.

item.title: Cam Waters sprints to Supercars victory as Broc Feeney suffers horror day
item.description: Championship leader Feeney had a race to forget as he veered off the track on lap 20.

item.title: Qantas teams up with scientists to beat jet lag on ultra-long flights after unveiling new non-stop route
item.description: It’s set to help passengers spend 21 hours in the air on the new non-stop Sydney to London route.

item.title: Middle East war: Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to renew ceasefire despite hostilities continuing
item.description: Violence abated significantly earlier this week but picked up in the hours before the reported ceasefire.

item.title: Anne Hathaway announces she’s pregnant with third child
item.description: The busy star shared the news in an Instagram video.

item.title: One killed and 89 injured as trains collide in Bedford near London
item.description: A major incident has been declared amid the peak-hour horror.

item.title: Tensions erupt as Italian PM slams Trump over ‘completely fabricated’ G7 summit claim
item.description: The ‘serious and offensive’ claim has shattered relations between the US and Italy.

item.title: First case of deadly bird flu H5N1 confirmed in Australia as infected seabird dies
item.description: The strain has reached epidemic proportions in animal populations around the world.

item.title: Pauline Hanson wants a monocultural Australia - here’s what that might actually look like
item.description: Could a country built on Indigenous heritage and generations of migration ever become monocultural?

item.title: King Charles III offers Prince Harry royal estate accommodation during UK visit signalling first reunion with grandkids in years
item.description: The gesture follows years of tension between the royal father and son.

item.title: Paul Avery, ‘All My Children’ and ‘Superman’ actor, dies in New Jersey house fire
item.description: ‘We loved them so much, and they loved us so much, and nobody ever had to wonder if that was so.’

item.title: Same‑sex parents to be formally recognised on South Australian birth certificates after Greens bill passes
item.description: New laws allow two mothers to be listed as mothers for the first time, with retrospective effect.

item.title: Ebola continues to spread in Democratic Republic of Congo camps as aid agency’s defunded
item.description: ‘People didn’t just die like this before.’

item.title: Major theatre show Beetlejuice The Musical axed amid cost pressures
item.description: ‘It is a difficult decision and not one we made lightly.’

item.title: Socceroos debutant Cristian Volpato shares one regret after ‘tearing up’ at World Cup anthem
item.description: The rising star has finally announced himself to Australia - but he admits he should have done so ‘a long time ago’.

item.title: Supercars champion Brodie Kostecki rushed to the doctor after mid-race health battle in Darwin
item.description: The 28-year-old somehow finished on the podium despite needing to be pulled out of his car for urgent medical attention.

item.title: Body cam shows Los Angeles officer fatally shoot dog during call about screaming woman
item.description: Police later learned the woman was screaming in reaction to the Knicks’ win.

item.title: Riot squad called as protesters target One Nation leader Pauline Hanson at Sydney charity ball
item.description: Hanson says she fears for her life after being targeted with disturbing texts and voicemails.

item.title: Australia relaxes psychedelic therapy rules despite safety concerns from clinicians
item.description: Some experts warn the changes could put vulnerable patients at risk.

item.title: AI-powered drones could patrol Sydney beaches to prevent shark attacks
item.description: The revolutionary technology could watch the coastline for 12 hours straight.

item.title: Fuel tax relief extended, but motorists are still about to pay more at the bowser
item.description: Fuel tax relief will continue through July, but the extension comes with a catch.

item.title: Devastated Socceroos captain Mat Ryan ‘hurting’ after World Cup omission
item.description: Mat Ryan has revealed a heart to heart conversation he had with coach Tony Popovic.

item.title: Beth Mooney scare mars Australia’s World Cup win over Dutch
item.description: The Aussie veteran has blamed her back stiffness on ‘all the bus travel’ the team has had to do.

item.title: British PM Keir Starmer expected to step down as rebellion grows within party ranks
item.description: If he resigns or is forced out, Britain would install its seventh prime minister in just over a decade — the highest turnover in nearly two centuries.

item.title: MotoGP championship leader Marco Bezzecchi banned from Czech Grand Prix after striking a marshal twice
item.description: The race official was only trying to help when he was struck in the face by a furious Marco Bezzecchi.

item.title: History as Curaçao, smallest ever FIFA World Cup nation, shocks Ecuador with nil-all draw
item.description: ‘A boulder in the sea has a point at the World Cup!’

item.title: Man charged over 'anti-Muslim' attacks in Edinburgh, Scotland
item.description: Counterterrorism detectives have charged a man after the shocking incident in Scotland's capital.

item.title: Donated breast milk saving lives of Australia’s tiniest babies as demand surges
item.description: Baby Ava was born at 31 weeks and donated milk helped save her life.

item.title: Norland College: What it takes to become one of the world’s most sought-after nannies
item.description: They have been entrusted the care of royal heirs and can earn around $220,000 each year.

item.title: Cam Waters clinches Triple Crown despite Anton De Pasquale’s flawless victory in Darwin
item.description: The Tickford Racing star did enough to secure the title as Anton De Pasquale won the final race of the weekend.

item.title: A royal restoration at Scotland’s Dumfries House reveals plans for Australia’s Hillview Estate
item.description: 7NEWS was welcomed inside Scotland’s Dumfries House and can reveal the plans to repeat the revitalisation at one of Australia’s stately homes.

item.title: Storm continue mid-season resurgence as Raiders’ finals hopes fade in try-scoring frenzy
item.description: Winger Will Warbrick scored a hat-trick as the Storm fought back from an early 16-point deficit.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife star Lily speaks out after dramatic exit from the show following Dylan and Ally’s kiss
item.description: Lily claims some of the girls are ‘playing the game’.

item.title: Origin debutant Mark Nawaqanitawase puts on a show as Roosters crush Sharks
item.description: The winger capped a whirlwind week with a brilliant performance.

item.title: Trump’s expletive-laden outburst stalls Iran negotiations in Switzerland
item.description: ‘You won’t even make it back to your f***ing country.’

item.title: Serena Williams relaunches bid to win 24th grand slam title after accepting Wimbledon singles wildcard
item.description: The 44-year-old legend is officially making a stunning comeback to singles tennis, jumping into the fire at Wimbledon.

item.title: Sonny Bill Williams rushed into second surgery after ‘worrying’ spinal cord infection
item.description: The rugby and NRL champion feared for his future when he suffered serious complications following a neck operation.

item.title: Three more arrested as evidence vanishes in Brazil rope swing death
item.description: The 21-year-old was thrown to her death after not being attached to a rope.

item.title: Aussie joyrides steal the show in ‘hilarious’ trophy presentation after T20 series win over Bangladesh
item.description: Two winners posed on bikes for ‘one of the great photos’ before deciding to take off around the ground.

item.title: Wyndham Clark admits ‘shock’ at seeing his father after sealing second US Open title
item.description: Wyndham Clark had no idea his dad had flown through the night to make a rare appearance to see him win.

item.title: Protester stopped as Iran battle to shock draw with Belgium at World Cup
item.description: Team officials slammed ‘an outright and undeniable lie’ from the US before the players shut out the drama to stay alive in the tournament.

item.title: ‘Gut wrenching’: Families left out of pocket as tiny home business goes bust
item.description: Kerrie and Brendan Carney say they’re among dozens of families left in the lurch.

item.title: Channel Seven stars shine bright as full list of TV Week Logie Awards nominees is released
item.description: Larry Emdur and Stephen Peacocke are among the stars nominated for this year’s awards, with hit shows Australian Idol and Farmer Wants A Wife also in the running.

item.title: Saints star Tom De Koning in hospital after suffering punctured lung and two broken ribs
item.description: The big-money recruit’s horror luck has continued two years after he was hospitalised with a similar diagnosis.

item.title: Sydney Swans veteran Taylor Adams announces retirement, effective immediately
item.description: The three-club midfielder has not played since halfway through last year.

item.title: Nicole Kidman and Keith Urban publicly acknowledge each other for first time since split
item.description: The country singer and Australian actress finalised their divorce in January after 19 years of marriage.

item.title: Concern as new anti-scam rules could lead to important texts being labelled spam
item.description: Businesses and services will be required to register branded text messages.

item.description: This crunchy salmon salad is packed with the healthy fats experts want you eating more of.

item.description: The British pop star shared a video filmed in hospital.

item.description: Australia’s largest poultry producer has reacted to the threat with a major move.

item.description: Updated FSD v14.3.3 software for Australia’s most popular new car last month, the Tesla Model Y, is now being rolled out across the country.

item.description: The 35-year-old remained tight-lipped when confronted about the alleged crime.

item.title: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
item.description: ‘He discovered, mentored, and championed the greatest artists in modern music history, leaving an indelible mark on culture that will endure for generations.’
